business_interpretation: Room type is strongly associated with listing price. Entire home/apartment listings have much higher median prices than private rooms and shared rooms.
Host portfolio segment is meaningfully related to listing price. Single-listing hosts have the highest median price, while large portfolio hosts have the lowest median price.
Occupancy proxy differs across room types. Entire home/apartment listings show much higher unavailable-day ratios than other room types.

comparison: Review score rating by room type
business_interpretation: Review scores differ across room types, but scores are highly concentrated near the top of the rating scale. Entire home/apartment listings have the highest median review score.
Capacity features such as accommodates, bedrooms, and beds show the strongest positive relationships with price. Review activity features show moderate negative relationships with price.
